headlines.headline: Talvyn Goods explores strategic alternatives for wireless connectivity unit

sentiment.reasoning: A 10% margin improvement indicates enhanced operational efficiency and profitability, which is a strong positive signal.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
